mapper.select: SELECT tf.ticket_id FROM ticket_follower tf WHERE tf.user_id = #{userId} AND tf.deleted = 0
SELECT DISTINCT tl.ticket_id FROM ticket_log tl WHERE tl.user_id = #{userId} AND tl.deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE ticket SET urge_count = IFNULL(urge_count, 0) + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
